---
id: app-update
title: "Updates an app"
description: "Updates an app by slug. Only updates the fields specified in the body."
sidebar_label: "Updates an app"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Updates an app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates an app by slug. Only updates the fields specified in the body.
